overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval-themed video game. The player character walks through a torchlit historic village at night, navigating narrow cobblestone streets between stone and timber-framed buildings, eventually passing another villager carrying a torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley between stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village street holding a torch aloft

tall weathered stone wall with wooden door
wooden wagon wheel leaning against the wall
tall wooden fence made of vertical planks
medieval half-timbered house with white plaster infill
burning torch mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a small courtyard and walks into a narrow cobblestone alley between high stone walls and wooden fences, illuminated only by the torch in hand and wall-mounted torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval street with merchant carts and storage barrels

events.description: passing a wooden cart parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past various wooden structures and storage items

entered.detail: wooden cart with covered canopy parked on the street
stone building with a framed portrait or decorative window on the upper floor
stack of wooden barrels outside a building entrance

segments.scene_description: The street widens slightly as the character passes wooden carts and storage barrels along the path, approaching a stone building with a distinctive framed window on its facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: village courtyard with hay storage and stone buildings

events.description: encountering another villager in red clothing carrying a torch

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard and passing another torch-bearing villager

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking with a torch, passing the player character on the right

entered.detail: stone building with large arched entrance and wooden doors
building with traditional thatched straw roof
low stone wall with arched opening

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open courtyard area with hay carts and stone storage buildings, encountering and passing another torch-bearing villager in red clothing near a stone wall with an arched doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic torchlit alley that gradually opens into a wider village courtyard. It begins in a small courtyard, moving into a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by high stone walls and wooden fences under the flickering glow of wall-mounted torches. As the path widens, the camera glides past wooden carts and storage barrels toward a stone building featuring a distinctive framed window. The scene then expands into a more open courtyard area filled with hay carts and stone storage buildings before finally passing a torch-bearing villager in red clothing near an arched stone doorway.
